title: tanacetum sorbifolium
intro: Tanacetum sorbifolium, also known as Tansy-leaved Tanacetum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, making it a popular herbal remedy. Tanacetum sorbifolium is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
